fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Mississippi Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Mississippi - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity mississippi, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to mississippi, speech-language pathologist compact mississippi, mississippi speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Mississippi State Department of Health — Speech-Language Pathology
board.physical_address: 570 E. Woodrow Wilson Dr., Jackson, MS 39216

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Every 2 years (by June 30th of even-numbered years)

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Mississippi.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Register and Apply Online
steps.description: Create an account on the MBESLPA Portal, log in, and complete the online application for Speech-Language Pathologist licensure.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documentation
steps.description: Arrange for official graduate transcripts (demonstrating a master's or doctoral degree) and official Praxis Examination scores to be sent directly to the Mississippi Board of Examiners for Speech-Language Pathologists and Audiologists.

steps.title: Verify Clinical Experience
steps.description: Provide verification of a supervised Clinical Fellowship Experience (CFY) or submit proof of current ASHA Certificate of Clinical Competence (CCC-SLP) if applicable.

steps.title: Complete Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Access and pass the Mississippi Jurisprudence Examination, which is typically available through the MBESLPA Portal.

steps.title: Undergo Background Check
steps.description: Follow instructions within the MBESLPA Portal to complete the required criminal background check.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Submit the non-refundable application fee of $100 as part of your online application in the MBESLPA Portal.

telepractice_text: Mississippi permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Mississippi issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Mississippi is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Mississippi SLP license cost?
Is Mississippi part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Mississippi allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Mississippi have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Mississippi participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Mississippi without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Mississippi?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Mississippi while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Mississippi is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

hero.title: Become a Speech-Language Pathologist in Mississippi
hero.dek: To apply for a Speech-Language Pathologist license in Mississippi, you must register and submit your application through the MBESLPA Portal.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: How to transfer your existing credential from another state

variants.label: Renewal
variants.description: How to renew your existing credential

official_links.registration_steps: Visit the MBESLPA Portal, click 'Register' for new users, enter your email and create a password, then confirm your email to log in and start your application.
